checks.name: english_public_content
checks.detail: No CJK characters were found in public app, API, data, README or script files.

checks.name: english_html_language
checks.detail: HTML document language and title are English.

checks.name: assess_treat_architecture
checks.detail: Two-subsystem architecture is visible.

checks.name: profile_controls
checks.detail: Interactive KOM-Profile controls are present.

checks.name: radiology_run_state
checks.detail: KOM-Rad keeps a run-state distinction.

checks.name: risk_prediction
checks.detail: Risk prediction is endpoint-backed, side-specific, and scenario controls are limited to modifiable or follow-up variables.

checks.name: bilateral_knee_logic
checks.detail: Left and right knees are explicit across profile, imaging and risk logic.

checks.name: bilateral_coupled_risk
checks.detail: KOM-Risk includes a transparent bilateral-coupled surrogate where contralateral pain/function/KL influence both knee predictions.

checks.name: bilateral_weight_v2_audit
checks.detail: KOM-Risk exposes endpoint-backed V4 bilateral coupling weights, KL4 ceiling semantics and a paired-knee retraining data strategy.

checks.name: kl4_ceiling_tka_gate
checks.detail: KL4 is no longer interpreted as KL+1 progression and severe KL4 knees trigger a high TKA-event floor.

checks.name: dashboard_endpoint_workflow
checks.detail: Overview places Settings immediately after Overview and shows a meaningful endpoint/data-contract workflow graph over a non-distorted bilateral knee radiograph background.

checks.name: dashboard_layer_navigation
checks.detail: Dashboard layer buttons jump to KOM-Profile, KOM-RAG, KOM-MDT, KOM-Safe and KOM-Rx.

checks.name: public_case_layout
checks.detail: KOM-Profile uses four direct patient cases and removes the public external grading classification.

checks.name: profile_card_readability
checks.detail: KOM-Profile case cards, summary badge, visible bilateral editor and sticky Next action prevent label overlap, clipping, hidden lower-left content and Case 4 wrapping.

checks.name: case_locked_kl_risk
checks.detail: KOM-Risk displays KL as locked profile-derived input and does not expose left/right KL sliders.

checks.name: editable_kl_profile_fields
checks.detail: KOM-Profile exposes editable left/right KL controls, while downstream modules read the resulting profile-derived KL values.

checks.name: smooth_profile_risk_sliders
checks.detail: WOMAC/NRS/BMI sliders update values without full page rerender on every input.

checks.name: persistent_profile_config
checks.detail: Profile configuration is saved locally and reused by downstream modules.

checks.name: rag_catalog_and_chain
checks.detail: KOM-RAG contains evidence-chain and full-catalog views.

checks.name: rag_sticky_domain_switcher
checks.detail: Specialty evidence chain keeps domain tabs and level filters sticky while the panel scrolls.

checks.name: rag_floating_evidence_detail
checks.detail: KOM-RAG evidence cards and chain nodes can open floating Evidence Unit details and close them by clicking the backdrop.

checks.name: interactive_dynamic_graph
checks.detail: Full graph figure is an interactive patient/query-driven network instead of a static overlapping image.

checks.name: rag_graph_level_sampling
checks.detail: Full graph figure samples across L1-L7 so L1 guideline rows cannot hide other evidence tiers.

checks.name: rag_quantified_evidence_detail
checks.detail: Evidence Unit detail extracts source-level population, intervention, result direction and quantitative-effect availability.

checks.name: l2_l3_evidence_qa
checks.detail: L2/L3 V28 source-abstract evidence QA completed for 2018 rows; weak marker rows: 0; missing V28 detail rows: 0.

checks.name: rag_catalog_pagination
checks.detail: Evidence catalog renders paginated rows and exports full JSON without freezing the page.

checks.name: patient_fit_rag_api
checks.detail: Patient-fit RAG retrieval has an API route and explicit success rule.

checks.name: mdt_specialty_agents
checks.detail: Specialty agents are present.

checks.name: mdt_agent_dialogue_api
checks.detail: Each MDT specialty agent exposes quick prompts and a local/API dialogue path using current patient data, selected modules and safety gates.

checks.name: deep_treatment_detail
checks.detail: Treatment plan includes concrete medication, injection, exercise, nutrition, psychology, pre-referral screening and frontier/research-only boundaries.

checks.name: selectable_rx_builder
checks.detail: KOM-Rx includes a clinician-selectable modular prescription builder.

checks.name: rx_evidence_support
checks.detail: Every selectable and final KOM-Rx module carries L1-L7 Evidence Unit support.

checks.name: final_rx_confirmation
checks.detail: Clinician-selected modules generate a saved final prescription after confirmation.

checks.name: semaglutide_obesity_module
checks.detail: Obese knee OA pathway includes a semaglutide/STEP 9 special-population option with safety boundaries.

checks.name: safe_compatibility_data_gates
checks.detail: KOM-Safe separates cross-specialty prescription compatibility from patient-data completeness gates.

checks.name: safe_negotiation
checks.detail: KOM-Safe negotiation loop is visible.

checks.name: safe_audit_traceability
checks.detail: KOM-Safe negotiation records auditable event IDs, input gate status and adoption rules.

checks.name: rx_report
checks.detail: KOM-Rx structured report is visible.

checks.name: score_validation
checks.detail: KOM-Score validation layers are represented.

checks.name: api_routes
checks.detail: Required API routes are registered.
